description_long: This is a cylindrical woven picnic basket with a distinctive two-tone color scheme, featuring a cream upper section and a red-and-black patterned lower section. The basket is constructed from interlaced natural fibers, giving it a textured, semi-rigid appearance. A single, smooth wooden handle arches across the top, attached to the rim with visible round fasteners. The weave is tight and uniform, with horizontal and vertical bands creating a visually appealing pattern. The interior is open and spacious, suitable for carrying food or personal items. There is no visible lid or closure mechanism, leaving the contents accessible from the top.
description: A cylindrical woven picnic basket with a cream and red-black pattern, featuring a wooden handle and an open top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cylindrical shape, the wooden handle, and the red-black woven pattern at the base.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the attachment of the handle and the open, lidless top.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, emphasizing the basket's symmetry and woven texture.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the opposite direction, again showing the handle attachment and open top.
attribute_handle_type: Single arched wooden handle, cylindrical, fixed at both ends with round fasteners.
attribute_weave_pattern: Tight, plain weave with horizontal and vertical bands; decorative color blocking at the base.
